market_summary.notes: South Korean markets (KOSPI) showing mixed performance as of March 20, 2026. Recent volatility driven by global oil price spikes above $110/barrel and Fed rate concerns, balanced by optimism over chip sector demand (Samsung, SK Hynix) and ongoing corporate governance reforms. Goldman Sachs maintains a 7,000 target for KOSPI by year-end.

art_highlights: 82nd Whitney Biennial at the Whitney Museum (on view through August 23, 2026).
Matisse's 'Jazz: Rhythms in Color' at the Art Institute of Chicago (through June 1, 2026).
Rashid Johnson: 'A Poem for Deep Thinkers' at the Modern Art Museum of Fort Worth (through September 27, 2026).
